evaluationCriterias.title: Professional Knowledge
evaluationCriterias.description: Assessment of professional expertise and job-related competence.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Shows significant gaps in required professional knowledge.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Demonstrates basic professional knowledge with noticeable limitations.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Meets expectations with solid and reliable professional knowledge.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Shows strong professional knowledge and applies it confidently.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Demonstrates outstanding professional knowledge at an expert level.

evaluationCriterias.title: Further Training (optional)
evaluationCriterias.description: Assessment of participation in further training and personal professional development.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Shows no relevant engagement in further training or professional development.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Participates only occasionally in further training with limited impact.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Takes part in relevant further training at an appropriate level.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Actively pursues further training and applies new knowledge effectively.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Shows exceptional commitment to continuous learning and development.

evaluationCriterias.title: Comprehension / Analytical Thinking
evaluationCriterias.description: Ability to quickly understand complex matters and analyze them logically.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Has substantial difficulty understanding and analyzing complex matters.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Understands straightforward issues but struggles with complexity.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Analyzes tasks reliably and understands complex matters adequately.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Quickly understands complex matters and analyzes them in a structured way.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Grasps complex matters exceptionally fast and analyzes them with outstanding clarity.

evaluationCriterias.title: Commitment to Performance
evaluationCriterias.description: Level of commitment, initiative, and willingness to contribute.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Shows very limited commitment, initiative, and willingness to contribute.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Displays inconsistent commitment and only occasional initiative.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Meets expectations with a dependable level of commitment and initiative.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Shows strong commitment and regularly contributes proactively.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Demonstrates exceptional commitment and consistently exceeds expectations.

evaluationCriterias.title: Resilience
evaluationCriterias.description: Ability to work reliably under pressure or heavy workload.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Has major difficulty maintaining performance under pressure.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Copes with pressure only to a limited extent.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Remains reliable under normal pressure and workload.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Handles pressure well and stays dependable under heavy workload.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Performs exceptionally well and remains composed even under very high pressure.

evaluationCriterias.title: Working Style
evaluationCriterias.description: Quality of work organization, structure, efficiency, and independence.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Work is poorly structured, inefficient, and requires close supervision.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Shows partial structure and independence but with clear weaknesses.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Works in an organized, efficient, and sufficiently independent manner.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Works in a highly structured, efficient, and independent manner.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Shows an exemplary working style with outstanding structure, efficiency, and independence.

evaluationCriterias.title: Reliability / Integrity
evaluationCriterias.description: Reliability, integrity, and adherence to agreements and rules.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Frequently fails to meet agreements or expected standards of integrity.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Is only partly reliable and shows inconsistencies in adherence to rules.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Acts reliably and with appropriate integrity in line with expectations.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Is highly reliable and consistently acts with integrity.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Shows exceptional reliability, integrity, and trustworthiness at all times.

evaluationCriterias.title: Work Results
evaluationCriterias.description: Quality, accuracy, and completeness of delivered work results.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Work results are frequently incomplete, inaccurate, or below expectations.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Work results show noticeable weaknesses in quality or completeness.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Delivers work results of acceptable quality, accuracy, and completeness.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Delivers high-quality, accurate, and complete work results.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Consistently delivers outstanding work results of exceptional quality.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Overall performance is clearly below expectations.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Overall performance partially meets expectations but has clear deficits.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Overall performance is strong and above expectations.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Overall performance is outstanding and consistently exceeds expectations.

evaluationCriterias.title: Behavior
evaluationCriterias.description: Conduct and interaction with colleagues, supervisors, customers, and partners.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: Behavior is frequently inappropriate or problematic in professional interactions.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: Behavior is mostly acceptable but shows recurring weaknesses.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: Behavior is professional and appropriate in daily interactions.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: Behavior is consistently positive, cooperative, and professional.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: Behavior is exemplary and strengthens collaboration with all stakeholders.

evaluationCriterias.title: Final Statement
evaluationCriterias.description: Final overall remark and summary of the evaluation.

ratingScaleFormulations.1: The final overall assessment is clearly unsatisfactory.
ratingScaleFormulations.2: The final overall assessment is below expectations in important areas.
ratingScaleFormulations.3: The final overall assessment is satisfactory and appropriate.
ratingScaleFormulations.4: The final overall assessment is very positive.
ratingScaleFormulations.5: The final overall assessment is exceptionally positive and highly favorable.
